For each of three daily shifts the total score is calculated; the total score per shift is a minimum of 0 and a maximum of 13; the total score for a day is a
minimum 0 and a maximum of 39. The DOS scale final score is calculated by dividing the total score for the day by 3; the DOS final score is between 0 and 13
The cut-off point is 3; a DOS scale final score of 3 or more indicates a delirium
